title: Vendor in latest containers/image and bump to version 0.3
body:
OCI 1.0 Image specification is now released so we want to bump
buildah version to support 1.0 images.

Bump to version 0.3

Signed-off-by: Dan Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM, pending CI.  We'll also need #201 in order to produce runtime configurations in the right format.

:pushpin: Commit ec2a259 has been approved by `rhatdan`
